bottom_line: Add a schema-version/TODO note to executor/pi_narration_guard.py so future pi JSONL shape changes do not silently misclassify narration exits.
coverage_notes: Read all small run/fix logs fully; sampled targeted grep lines from larger S12/S13 logs for failure and narration-test traces. Queried DB daemon_events for entity_id=I-00114 step_crashed (count=0).

findings.title: Narration classifier lacks explicit pi session schema-version note
findings.recommendation: Add a short comment/TODO near _extract_last_assistant_blocks/classify_last_assistant documenting the assumed pi JSONL schema and fallback expectations on schema drift.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add a schema-version compatibility note/TODO for pi JSONL narration classification in executor/pi_narration_guard.py; context: I-00114 self-assess report.

findings.title: Integration gate retries consumed full-suite runtime on deterministic non-narration failure
findings.recommendation: Add a fail-fast precheck for CLI-spec documentation parity before running full integration suite in the QV integration gate path.
